title: hashcat
html:
hashcat

> GPU-accelerated hash cracking. Use after extracting hashes from targets.

Common Modes

| Mode | Hash Type | Example Source | |------|-----------|---------------| | 0 | MD5 | Web apps, /etc/shadow (rare) | | 100 | SHA1 | Web apps | | 1000 | NTLM | SAM dump, secretsdump | | 1800 | sha512crypt | Linux /etc/shadow | | 3200 | bcrypt | Web apps | | 5600 | NTLMv2 | Responder capture | | 13100 | Kerberoast (TGS-REP etype 23) | GetUserSPNs.py | | 18200 | AS-REP Roast | GetNPUsers.py | | 22000 | WPA-PBKDF2 | Wi-Fi capture |

Basic Usage

hashcat -m MODE hash.txt /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt

# With rules (much better success rate)
hashcat -m MODE hash.txt wordlist -r /usr/share/hashcat/rules/best64.rule

# Show cracked
hashcat -m MODE hash.txt --show

Mask Attack (brute-force patterns)

# ?u=upper ?l=lower ?d=digit ?s=special ?a=all
hashcat -m 1000 -a 3 hash.txt ?u?l?l?l?l?d?d?d
hashcat -m 1000 -a 3 hash.txt 'Company?d?d?d?d!'

Combinator Attack

hashcat -m MODE -a 1 hash.txt wordlist1 wordlist2

Tips

- Use --force on VMs without GPU - -O for optimized kernels (faster, max password length 32) - -w 3 for workload profile (highest performance) - Kerberoast: mode 13100 for RC4, 19700 for AES
